title: AUB Extension Component Registry
description: Project-level registry of namespaced (team:component) custom component types and their production implementation mappings. Resolved by AUB validation and bundled into agent handoffs.

name.description: Namespaced type, team:component (e.g. acme:data_card). Must not collide with a core type.

isContainer.description: true if the component may declare children; false for a leaf.

description.description: What the component is — agents read this to resolve the type without guessing.

implementations.description: Production component mappings. Agents should reuse these implementations instead of recreating the component.

id.description: Stable mapping id, for example react or angular.

module.description: Package or module specifier used by the target repository.

export.description: Exported component symbol. Omit for a default export or custom element.

sourcePath.description: Optional repository-relative source file for code navigation.

props.description: Map production prop names to Blueprint data paths.

notes.description: Implementation constraints that the coding agent must preserve.

from.description: Blueprint data path such as content.title, bindings.value, states.loading, or literal:compact.
